hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && echo '{}' && exit 0; b=$(basename "$f"); case "$b" in .env.example) echo '{}' ;; .env|.env.*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading .env files is blocked for security"}}' ;; *) echo '{}' ;; esac
